creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best mid-range hotel with a swimming pool in Copenhagen? 

Scandic Spectrum is located 5 minutes from the Central Station and Tivoli Gardens in the heart of Copenhagen. It’s a pretty new hotel, so I think the rooms are also going to be very nice.

Again, this is not a sponsored post, but I’ve been to the hotel’s spa area for the ‘saunagus’ thing a few times (which I’ve also paid for myself, so I’ve got no affiliation with the hotel), and I just wanted to share it with you guys as I know a lot of you follow me for Copenhagen content 🤓  If you want to see more Copenhagen hotels, check out my travel blog, where I’ve written a massive post about the best areas and places to stay in CPH (there’s a link in my profile).

I’ve also got a video on my Youtube channel where I share 4 of the best areas to stay in Copenhagen as a tourist 🤓

#copenhagen #wheretostay #copenhagentravel

transcription.text: I think I found the best value for money hotel in Copenhagen, in a city where hotels are extremely expensive. This place is actually like the sweet spot between the cheaper hotels and the luxury hotels. I went there yesterday for this sauna event in their spa area and I just wanted to share this with you guys. The indoor swimming pool was awesome and I can see that a lot of the rooms will have a nice city view and then I ate in the restaurant and that was pretty good for a hotel restaurant. So maybe check out the Scandic Spectrum if you're planning a trip to Copenhagen.
